fields.description:
## Problem
tracker_head_sha intentionally rejects any git status output, but initialized ticket stores do not ignore reducer-owned per-ticket .archived and .write.lock runtime markers. A normal store with archived tickets is therefore permanently dirty and every plan review returns unsigned INDETERMINATE store-read-failure. The live store also has two old orphan review/signature events that fsck recovery must reconcile separately.

## Plan
- Add the two reducer runtime marker patterns to the canonical tickets-branch gitignore ensure.
- Add migration and clean-store regression coverage proving existing stores converge and strict tracker_head_sha succeeds with runtime markers present.
- Use the supported fsck recovery path for genuinely orphaned event files; do not weaken strict dirty/unmerged detection.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Per-ticket .archived and .write.lock runtime markers are ignored in new and migrated ticket stores.
- [ ] tracker_head_sha succeeds on an otherwise-clean store containing those markers.
- [ ] Genuine untracked event files remain visible to git status and still produce store-read-failure.
- [ ] Existing gitignore ensure tests and focused relation snapshot tests pass.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The live store is clean after supported recovery and the blocked 75de plan review can proceed.
